label: Bab Long Short
signal: Long the low-beta quintile, short the high-beta quintile, scaled beta-neutral.
description: Frazzini-Pedersen BAB: long bottom-quintile beta, short top-quintile beta, beta-neutral scaling (capped 3×). Betas = Vasicek-shrunk (bswa32, Better Market Betas dataset). Monthly, 5bps/side per leg.
